channel.title: Gatewayapi on Sergio Méndez Website
channel.description: Recent content in Gatewayapi on Sergio Méndez Website

item.title: Goodbye Ingress, Hello Gateway API: Migrating the Right Way, Blog Post, dev.to
item.description:
In this blog post I explain how to migrate to use the Kubernetes Gateway API using NGINX Gateway Fabric and Cert-Manager for TLS certificates.

Link
